subtitle.midnight_transit.message_audio: Whatever you do, do not go outside when dark...
message_audio.midnight_transit.line1: Whatever you do, do not go outside when dark.
message_audio.midnight_transit.line2: It lurks and tries to kill you, he stalks you without you knowing.
message_audio.midnight_transit.line3: Make an house as fast as possible. If you hear footsteps, immediately hide.
message_audio.midnight_transit.line4: It lur- Error, Error, Error. System Over- Die Die Die Die Die Die Die, I SEE YOU.
hide.midnight_transit.title: HIDE
